item.title: My week
item.description:
This week I:

  • Worked on a custom project
  • Figured out Hugo
  • Set up a local server
  • Learned how to edit configuration files
  • Completed Lab #6

It was fun!

item.title: Version control. Git
item.description:
Git is a version control system that helps track changes to code.

Basic commands:

  • git init — create a repository
  • git add — add files
  • git commit — save changes
  • git push — send to GitHub
  • git pull — download changes

In my project, I use Git to publish the site to GitHub Pages.
